description_long: This cabinetry unit features a long wooden countertop with a built-in dark gray sink and integrated draining board on one end. Below the countertop, there are two large appliance spaces, likely for a washer and dryer, flanked by lower cabinets with flat white doors. On one side, a tall pantry cabinet extends vertically, providing ample storage space. The cabinetry is finished in a combination of light wood grain and smooth white surfaces, with minimalistic, handle-less doors for a modern look. Plumbing fixtures are visible beneath the sink, and the overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for a laundry or utility area in an urban environment.
description: A modern cabinetry unit with a wood countertop, integrated sink, tall pantry, and appliance spaces, finished in white and wood grain. Features handle-less doors and a sleek, functional design.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the depth of the wood countertop, the integrated sink, and the tall pantry cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length of the cabinetry, the sink, appliance spaces, lower cabinets, and tall pantry.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the height and wood grain finish of the tall pantry cabinet.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the cabinetry, the wood countertop, and the sink's position at the far end.
attribute_cabinet_type: tall pantry cabinet with base cabinet and appliance housing
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door and double door
